hero.title1: The World is More Than Headlines.
hero.subtitle: Select a city from the interactive deck or spin the globe to dive into atomic, district-level realities and native customs.

features.title: Unveiling the Culture Graph
features.subtitle: How Qultre connects local micro-information into a unified network of discovery.
features.f1_desc: Skip the tourist traps. Drop straight into the local rhythm with secrets curated by people who actually live there.
features.f2_desc: Tap a card to unlock instant, offline-ready street smarts—from buying a train ticket without looking lost to ordering coffee like a native.
features.f3_desc: See how the world connects. Fall in love with a hidden jazz alley in Madrid, and let Qultre reveal its sister district waiting for you in Lisbon.

pricing.title: A Dual-Layer Model
pricing.subtitle: Designed for curiosity, validated for utility.
pricing.free_desc: Always free access to standard regional metrics, basic attractions, and translation helpers.
pricing.premium_desc: Deep cultural insights, neighborhood trend graphs, real-time safety indices, and offline micro-utility integrations.

waitlist.title: Become a Local Native
waitlist.subtitle: We prioritize physical discovery frameworks. Gain immediate priority access vectors before standard public release deployments.
waitlist.error: Failed to connect. Please try again later.

faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the Qultre project.
faqs.a1: Think of it as a living map that connects countries, cities, and neighborhoods together. Instead of jumping between ten different blogs, translation apps, and transit guides, Qultre weaves everything into a single visual story so you can step off the plane feeling like a local.
faqs.q2: How do I use the City Cards?
faqs.a2: They are bite-sized, interactive cheat-sheets for your phone! Tap a city card to get instant, clear answers to on-the-ground questions—like how to buy a metro pass, local tipping rules, or the best neighborhoods to explore without the crowds.
faqs.q3: Is it free to join the waitlist?
faqs.a3: 100% free. By dropping your email today, you lock in early "first-wave" access to our pilot city decks before anyone else, helping us shape the ultimate way to see the world.

footer.description: Connecting the world through structured local discovery. Discover districts, respect cultures, explore natively.
footer.madeBy: Designed and built by Qultre Team.
